title: RobustnessMetrics
description: Schema for declaring robustness metrics used in DMDU/RDM evaluations. Supports multiple metric families. Prohibits canonical equation mandates.

metrics_id.description: Unique identifier for this robustness metrics declaration

allowed_families.description: Which robustness metric families are applicable to this evaluation

declaration.description: What the metric measures and how it is computed

rationale.description: Why this metric family was selected over alternatives

formula.description: Optional formula. NOT REQUIRED — no canonical equation is mandated.

comparative_across_scenarios.description: Robustness must always be comparative across scenarios. This is a SEALED requirement.

claim_strength.description: Evidence level for this metric selection

$comment: PROHIBITION: This schema does NOT require a canonical robustness equation. The chosen_metric.formula field is optional. Per DMDU/RDM literature, multiple valid robustness notions exist.
